---
title: "Decoding Higher Education"
subtitle: "A Trend Analysis of Industrial Engineering Programs in Turkey"
sidebar: false
---

<div class="glass-card">
## Welcome to Our Project

**Team Name:** Let It Happen

**Team Members:** * [Yusuf Bora Çavdar](https://yusufboracavdar.github.io)  
* [Onur Furkan Gök](https://onurfgg.github.io)
</div>

<br>

<div class="glass-card">
## Project Overview
While university placement data is public, there is often a lack of analytical perspective on how factors like geographic location, quota sizes, and demand density impact a department's popularity. As Industrial Engineering students, our objective is to apply data analytics to our own domain. 

We aim to identify the underlying drivers of success and regional demand for Industrial Engineering departments across Turkey between 2018 and 2024. By integrating official placement statistics with comprehensive demand metrics, this project decodes the real factors that elevate an engineering program to the top tiers.
</div>

<br>

### Key Takeaways

* **Hybrid Data Sourcing:** Successfully integrated live API extraction (`thestats`) with static datasets (Kaggle) to construct a comprehensive timeline.
* **National Trends:** Clear shifts identified in placement capacities and base rankings across Turkish universities.
* **Regional & Demand Correlations:** Advanced modeling reveals strong relationships between a program's geographical location, its demand-to-quota ratio, and its ultimate national success ranking.
